title: Mute/unmute and change notification settings for multiple boards at once
excerpt:
As a board owner, it would be great to be able to select a bunch of boards all at once and mute/unmute them all in one click. 
As a board member, it would be great to be able to select a bunch of boards all at once and s…

posts.author: bob1 (bob)
posts.cookedHtml:
As a board owner, it would be great to be able to select a bunch of boards all at once and mute/unmute them all in one click.

As a board member, it would be great to be able to select a bunch of boards all at once and set your own notification settings in one click.

Right now we have to open every single board one by one to change those settings and it is a very tedious process.

Also, please note that this request is different from Change notifications settings of ALL boards at once - Platform discussions - monday Community Forum. We don’t want to a one-rule-fits-all solution that applies to all boards, we just want a way to batch edit notification settings from multiple boards at once.
